document_api_meta.title: Get Submission Records
document_api_meta.env_desc: Retrieve a paginated list of submission records for the authorized seller, including submission status, review results, and linked opportunity/product information. Useful for tracking submission history and monitoring review outcomes.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: status
request_query_param.desc: Filter by submission status: PENDING_REVIEW / APPROVED / REJECTED. Leave empty to return all statuses.

request_query_param.name: submit_time_ge
request_query_param.desc: Filter submissions created after this time, second-level timestamp

request_query_param.name: submit_time_lt
request_query_param.desc: Filter submissions created before this time, second-level timestamp

request_query_param.name: page_token
request_query_param.desc: Pagination token from previous response. Omit for first page.

request_query_param.name: page_size
request_query_param.desc: Number of results per page. Max: 100. Default: 20.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^^^opportunity_id
response_param.desc: The opportunity ID this submission is linked to.

response_param.name: ^^^rejection_reason
response_param.example: Product does not match the opportunity category requirements
response_param.desc: Rejection reason if status is REJECTED. Null otherwise.

response_param.name: ^^next_page_token
response_param.desc: Token for fetching next page. Empty if no more pages.

document_api_meta.response_body: {"code":0,"data":{"data":{"submissions":[{"id":"8001234567890123456","opportunity_id":"7123456789012345678","opportunity_title":"Women's High-Waist Yoga Leggings","status":"APPROVED","product_id":"7298374612938475620","product_name":"Premium Yoga Leggings - Black","submit_time":1775973876,"review_time":1775973876,"rejection_reason":"Product does not match the opportunity category requirements","product_orders":121,"product_pv":320}],"next_page_token":"100","total_count":300}},"message":"Success","request_id":"202203070749000101890810281E8C70B7"}

sample_code.label: Go
sample_code.value:
// For more details about the SDK, refer to the documentation:
// https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/67c83e0799a75104986ae498
func product202604GetSubmissionRecordsGet() {
    configuration := apis.NewConfiguration()
    configuration.AddAppInfo(appKey, appSecret)
    apiClient := apis.NewAPIClient(configuration)
    request := apiClient.ProductV202604API.Product202604OpportunitiesSubmissionsGet(context.Background())
    request = request.XTtsAccessToken("your access token")
    request = request.ContentType("application/json")
    request = request.Status("APPROVED")
    request = request.OpportunityId("7123456789012345678")
    request = request.ProductId("7298374612938475620")
    request = request.SubmitTimeGe(1775973876)
    request = request.SubmitTimeLt(1776973876)
    request = request.PageToken("100")
    request = request.PageSize(20)
    request = request.ShopCipher("your shop cipher")
    resp, httpResp, err := request.Execute()
    if err != nil || httpResp.StatusCode != 200 {
        fmt.Printf("productsRequest err:%v resbody:%s", err, httpResp.Body)
        return
    }
    if resp == nil {
        fmt.Printf("response is nil")
        return
    }
    if resp.GetCode()!= 0 {
        fmt.Printf("response business is error, errorCode:%d errorMessage:%s", resp.GetCode(), resp.GetMessage())
        return
    }
    respDataJson, _ := json.MarshalIndent(resp.GetData(), "", "  ")
    fmt.Println("response data:", string(respDataJson))
    return
}

scope_list.package_description: The Partner will be able to sync your product information to TikTok Shop(s). For products available in the EU markets, this also includes the information of the Responsible Persons and Manufacturer.
